name: Zucchini W/Toasted Almonds
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons sliced almonds - pan toasted until golden
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the zucchini lengthwise into 1/4-inch slices.
2. Stack and cut into 1-inch squares.
3. Steam until just tender, about 2-3 minutes.
4. Saute in oil over medium-high heat for another half minute or so.
5. Stir in garlic and remove from heat.
6. Finish with lemon juice, stir in toasted almonds, and serve.
